meta.title: Alexandria Bookshop — Strategy Brief (English)
meta.description: Strategy brief for an English-language SME. Fictional independent bookshop in Alexandria.
meta.scenario: Independent bookshop wants to grow online sales and social media presence.

team_capacity: Owner and one part-time assistant. No marketing experience.
constraints: Shop open 10am-9pm, staff have limited daytime availability

clarification_answers.question_text: Do you currently run any email newsletter?
clarification_answers.answer_text: No, but I have collected about 50 emails from customers manually.
